channel.title: Autoupdate on Remko's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Autoupdate on Remko's Blog

item.title: Disabling Java Autoupdate
item.description:
I did an unattended install of Java Jre1.6_0.22 using an mst file that puts all (auto)update properties to off.

However it seems that Java simply ignores this, so usually a script runs after the install to the delete some registry keys and perform some extra configuration.

item.title: Globally disable Flash Player autoupdate
item.description:
On a Citrix or Terminal Server you will want to disable autoupdate notifications of the flash player.

This can be done by creating a file mm.cfg in the folder where the flash ActiveX control is installed (normally C:\Windows\System32\Macromed\Flash).

Place the following line in this file (with a text editor like Notepad):
